import axios from"axios";export const API="".concat(process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL,"/api");const TOKEN_KEY="sahuja_admin_token";export const getToken=()=>localStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY);export const setToken=t=>localStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY,t);export const clearToken=()=>localStorage.removeItem(TOKEN_KEY);export const isAuthed=()=>!!getToken();export const api=axios.create({baseURL:API});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=getToken();if(token)config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);return config;});api.interceptors.response.use(r=>r,err=>{var _err$response;if((err===null||err===void 0?void 0:(_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:_err$response.status)===401){clearToken();}return Promise.reject(err);});export async function adminLogin(email,password){const{data}=await axios.post("".concat(API,"/auth/login"),{email,password});setToken(data.access_token);return data;}export async function adminMe(){const{data}=await api.get("/auth/me");return data;}// Resize image on client so base64 stays reasonable
export function fileToResizedBase64(file){let maxWidth=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:1800;let quality=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:0.82;return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const reader=new FileReader();reader.onload=()=>{const img=new Image();img.onload=()=>{const ratio=Math.min(1,maxWidth/img.width);const w=Math.round(img.width*ratio);const h=Math.round(img.height*ratio);const canvas=document.createElement("canvas");canvas.width=w;canvas.height=h;const ctx=canvas.getContext("2d");ctx.drawImage(img,0,0,w,h);resolve(canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg",quality));};img.onerror=reject;img.src=reader.result;};reader.onerror=reject;reader.readAsDataURL(file);});}
